top_signals.title: Emerging FX Index Edges Up on Peace Deal Ahead of Fed Meeting
top_signals.summary: An index for emerging-market currencies edged higher before the end-of-day adjustment Monday as traders weighed the interim peace deal between the US and Iran against uncertainty from the Federal Reserve’s upcoming policy meeting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Databricks sales growth tops 80%, but margin are shrinking from swarm of AI agents
top_signals.summary: Databricks is seeing higher growth as AI agents assist with data analysis, but all that activity is significantly increasing costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kalshi Aims to Expand Perpetual Futures After $5.5 Billion Debut
top_signals.summary: Kalshi Inc. is looking to expand its new perpetual futures business beyond digital assets after the never-expiring derivatives racked up more than $5.5 billion of trading volume in their first two weeks on the prediction-market platform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Barr, Efficient and Effective Central Banking: Beyond the Balance Sheet
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Money Marketeers of New York University, New York, New York
